motivation: Establish PPO performance baseline on 15-game Atari subset
comment: COMPLETE 45/45 (3-seed). Key means: Alien=198, BattleZone=3700, Solaris=2615, Phoenix=796, NameThisGame=2161, MsPacman=319, SpaceInvaders=147, Qbert=158, PrivateEye=-45, Amidar=1.4, Breakout=1.3. Fails: Enduro/MontezumaRevenge/Venture=0.

motivation: Establish PQN performance baseline on 15-game Atari subset
comment: COMPLETE 45/45 (3-seed). Key means: Alien=152, Amidar=31, Breakout=2, BattleZone=6021, SpaceInvaders=280, PrivateEye=-12. Fails: Enduro/MontezumaRevenge/Venture/Phoenix=0.

motivation: Add LayerNorm to PPO NatureCNN — known plasticity intervention from CHAIN-SP paper
comment: COMPLETE 45/45 3-seed at 40M. CORRECTED: 3W/6L/6T (not 1W/9L/4T). WINS: Alien +87%, Amidar +1305%, Breakout +14%. LOSSES: BattleZone -27%, MsPacman -26%, PrivateEye -1526%, Qbert -33%, Solaris -72%, SpaceInvaders -63%. Net -3. Confirmed catastrophic on key games.

motivation: Add Normalize-and-Project to PQN — complement existing LayerNorm, top plasticity method from Plasticine
comment: COMPLETE 15/15 pilot (5W/2L/8T vs PQN). WINS: Alien +19%, MsPacman +52%, NameThisGame +49%, Phoenix (84 vs 0), Solaris +23%. LOSSES: BattleZone -42%, PrivateEye -945%. 3-seed eval IN PROGRESS (many still running/pending).

motivation: Full CHAIN-SP approach: LayerNorm + churn reduction loss for PPO
comment: PILOT 15/15: 6W/3L/6T (net +3). WINS: Alien +11%, Amidar +2190%, DoubleDunk +15%, NameThisGame +19%, Phoenix +22%, PrivateEye +261%. LOSSES: BattleZone -47%, Solaris -48%, SpaceInvaders -23%. Strong on exploration games. 3-seed eval IN PROGRESS.

motivation: DreamerV3-style symlog/symexp on value targets for scale-invariant learning
comment: COMPLETE 15/15 at 40M. 2W/2L/10T — NEUTRAL. Closed.

motivation: Post-update weight shrinkage + noise for plasticity maintenance (proven in on-policy RL)
comment: PILOT 15/15: 3W/2L/10T (net +1). WINS: Amidar +96%, PrivateEye +176%, Solaris +55%. LOSSES: BattleZone -33%, MsPacman -17%. Subtle but complementary wins. 3-seed eval RUNNING.

motivation: Add LSTM to PQN for memory-dependent games (Montezuma, Venture, etc.)
comment: NOW 12/15 games (5W/3L/4T vs PQN). WINS: DoubleDunk +22%, MsPacman +85%, Phoenix (489 vs 0!), Qbert +29%, Solaris +229%. LOSSES: Amidar -28%, BattleZone -51%, SpaceInvaders -29%. Strong but polarized. Missing: Alien, NameThisGame, PrivateEye.

motivation: Random Network Distillation intrinsic motivation for hard exploration games
comment: PILOT 15/15: 3W/4L/8T (net -1). WINS: Amidar +2190%, Breakout +11%, PrivateEye +171%. LOSSES: BattleZone -42%, MsPacman -10%, NameThisGame -21%, Phoenix -18%. Closed.

motivation: Replace NatureCNN with IMPALA ResNet encoder — stronger visual processing with residual connections
comment: Only 2/14 at 40M. Breakout +37%. 12 games still running — too early.

motivation: Replace NatureCNN with IMPALA ResNet encoder for PQN baseline
comment: Only 2/14 at 40M. Breakout +40%. 12 games still running — too early.

motivation: DrQ-style random shift augmentation — improves representation quality
comment: PILOT 15/15: 3W/2L/10T (net +1). WINS: Amidar +139%, Phoenix +11%, PrivateEye +1228% (massive!). LOSSES: BattleZone -23%, MsPacman -19%. DrQ gives huge PrivateEye boost. 3-seed eval RUNNING.

motivation: Spectral norm on CNN layers constrains Lipschitz constant, prevents rank collapse
comment: PILOT 15/15: 5W/3L/7T (net +2). BEST PPO SINGLE TECHNIQUE. WINS: Amidar +126%, NameThisGame +18%, Phoenix +19%, PrivateEye +196%, Solaris +17%. LOSSES: BattleZone -50%, MsPacman -10%, Qbert -21%. 3-seed eval RUNNING.

motivation: Anneal entropy coef from 0.03 to 0.001 — high early exploration, low late exploitation
comment: CORRECTED: 1W/5L/7T on 13/14 games. Only SpaceInvaders win. Losses on BattleZone/MsPacman/Phoenix/PrivateEye/Solaris. POOR. Closed.

motivation: Adaptive value function normalization for scale-invariant learning across games
comment: CORRECTED 14/15 games: 2W/3L/9T. WINS: NameThisGame +13%, PrivateEye (-5.8 vs -44.5). LOSSES: BattleZone -41%, MsPacman -21%, Solaris -24%. Net negative. Closed.

motivation: Random pruning 50% weights at init, static mask throughout training — ICML 2025 oral
comment: COMPLETE 14/15 games: 1W/3L/10T. WIN: PrivateEye (+138%). LOSSES: BattleZone -22%, MsPacman -15%, Solaris -24%. Minimal impact, net negative. Closed.

motivation: Replace PPO clipping with soft TV divergence penalty — ICLR 2025, simpler trust region
comment: 13/15 games: 1W/3L/9T. WIN: Phoenix +14%. LOSSES: BattleZone -46%, MsPacman -19%, PrivateEye catastrophic -322%. Closed.

motivation: Schedule-Free optimizer eliminates LR annealing, maintains optimal implicit schedule — NeurIPS 2024
comment: COMPLETE 45/45 3-seed. CORRECTED: 3W/8L/4T (net -5). WINS: Amidar +1018%, Enduro (11 vs 0), SpaceInvaders +83%. LOSSES: Alien -36%, DoubleDunk -29%, MsPacman -27%, NameThisGame -36%, Phoenix -64%, PrivateEye -347%, Qbert -11%, Solaris -90%. Very poor. Closed.

motivation: Muon uses Newton-Schulz orthogonalization on gradients for matrix-shaped params
comment: 4/15 games: 0W/0L/4T. Phoenix q4=826 (corrected), Amidar q4=2.5 (corrected from old-format 31). All ties so far. 11 games still running.

motivation: Separate value and advantage streams for better value estimation — adapted for actor-critic
comment: COMPLETE 45/45 3-seed. CORRECTED: 5W/6L/4T (net -1). WINS: Amidar +3052%, BattleZone +35%, Breakout +246%, MsPacman +95%, SpaceInvaders +171%. LOSSES: DoubleDunk -26%, NameThisGame -20%, Phoenix -84%, PrivateEye -649%, Qbert -11%, Solaris -72%. High variance, closed.

motivation: Combine h013 (SpectralNorm) and h012 (DrQ aug) — complementary wins on PrivateEye/Phoenix/Solaris/NameThisGame
comment: Pilot submitted: 15 games × 1 seed across all 4 clusters.

motivation: Replace scalar V(s) with N-quantile distributional value head using quantile Huber loss — richer gradient signal, more robust value estimates
comment: Pilot submitted: 15 games × 1 seed. Novel: distributional critic for PPO.

motivation: Combine SpectralNorm on CNN (h013) with soft S&P on linear layers (h007) — dual plasticity mechanism
comment: Pilot submitted: 15 games × 1 seed. Combination of complementary plasticity methods.

motivation: NeurIPS 2024 — constrain feature drift during PPO updates via L2 loss on pre-activation changes. Prevents representation collapse that causes BattleZone degradation pattern.
comment: Pilot submitted: 15 games × 1 seed. Key test: does PFO prevent universal BattleZone degradation?

motivation: Train two independent V-heads, use min(V1,V2) for conservative advantage estimation. Reduces value overestimation — inspired by TD3 double Q trick applied to actor-critic PPO.
comment: Pilot submitted: 15 games × 1 seed across all 4 clusters. Novel: double critic for on-policy PPO.

motivation: Combine best PQN techniques: LSTM (h008, 6W/3L) provides memory for games like MsPacman/Solaris, NaP (h004, 5W/2L) maintains plasticity via weight projection. NaP excludes LSTM params to preserve gate dynamics.
comment: Pilot submitted: 15 games × 1 seed across all 4 clusters. Key test: do memory + plasticity compound?
